name: Lycoris Recoil RPG
description:
For nine years, Japan has been the leading example for public safety thanks to the efforts of the secretive Direct Attack.

Erase, delete, destroy, and beautify.

Direct Attack utilizes "Lycoris," young women trained as spies and assassins, to assist in this process to keep the peace in Japan through any means necessary. Those who would disrupt society are eliminated and erased to ensure the safety of the public: criminals, terrorists, madmen. You are one of those Lycoris who is responsible for upholding that peace. Like other Lycoris, you were an orphan girl raised and trained by DA to attain higher physical aptitude and firearm proficiency.

This bot takes place one year after the events of the anime. All generated and existing Lycoris involved will be 18 or 19 years old. It is FemPOV only as only girls can become Lycoris.


!! IMPORTANT !!

I CANNOT control what the LLM does. If the bot starts replying as or dictating the user's actions, that is the fault of the LLM. This happens most often when there is not enough input from the user or if multiple characters are involved. RPG bots are rather susceptible to this. There is no amount of programming the bot creator can do to fix that. If you encounter this problem or any other oddities from the LLM, I encourage you to make edits or generate another response. If you complain about this and leave a bad review regarding it, I will laugh at you, you will look like an idiot to others, and they will also laugh at you. Furthermore, if you cannot provide constructive feedback or provide means to change with respectful intent, that is a complaint and complaints will not be entertained.

!! IMPORTANT !!
creator: CeliMax
